name: Telegram (Personal)
description: Telegram MTProto client via the mcp-telegram MCP server — full personal account access.
setup_steps: Set TELEGRAM_API_ID and TELEGRAM_API_HASH via the marketplace credential UI
Run `mcp-telegram login` once to create the session file (phone + SMS code flow)
notes: First-pass: spawns mcp-telegram per action call (stdio). Persistent in-process session is a follow-up. Auth is a one-time user-interactive step; not automatable via inbox.
